payload.prompt:
Project: eighth-batch-render-image-smoke
Target market: US
Target language: en-US
Project notes: Minimal real smoke for render_image chain
Sequence plan: Sequence 1 - hook - Introduce the beauty product with a clean premium visual
Primary visual subject: Beauty serum hero shot
Create a premium TikTok beauty product hero image on pure white background, serum bottle centered vertically, clean studio lighting, realistic packaging detail, high-end cosmetic advertising look, 9:16 composition.
Visual constraints: {'style': 'studio_clean', 'platform': 'tiktok_9_16', 'background': '#FFFFFF'}
payload.negative_prompt: blurry, deformed packaging, extra objects, cropped product, watermark, text overlay
